programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS vincula una extraña escena del crimen en el Cementerio Nacional de Arlington con una serie de ataques contra veteranos sin hogar.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga a la cabo de la Marina Laney Alimonte (Camryn Grimes) después de que la evidencia sugiere que asesinó a su vecina mientras un hipnoterapeuta la trataba por insomnio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El hijo de un suboficial es encontrado asesinado en su fiesta de “bienvenida a casa desde la prisión”. Las evidencias indican que el mejor amigo de toda la vida de Kasie, Dante Brown (Devale Ellis), es el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es encontrada muerta en un club sólo para hombres, Danny y Baez investigan si su muerte fue un accidente o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Cuidado con lo que deseas
programme.desc: Después de que un paramédico sea asesinado a tiros, Danny y Baez trabajan para determinar quién está detrás de una cadena de robos de ambulancias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Donde la verdad yace
programme.desc: Frank está en la cuerda floja cuando una viuda le culpa del reciente suicidio de su marido mientras trabajaba. Además, cuando Eddie tiene un presentimiento sobre un asesinato, ella y Erin se unen para resolver el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Imprudente
programme.desc: Frank debe descubrir la verdad cuando un agente encubierto acusa a un compañero de brutalidad policial. Además, Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un famoso fotógrafo acusado recientemente de agresión por sus antiguas modelos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/01/2015. On these unspoiled islands, native tribes confront the factors that threaten the traditions of ancient people.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 4/8/2018. Numbed by grief after the assassination of her husband, Jackie crafts JFK’s legacy, while Bobby becomes a champion of the dispossessed and the family’s next great political hope.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 4/15/2018. Tragedy strikes again when Bobby Kennedy is assassinated in LA and only surviving son, Ted Kennedy, must overcome scandal and misfortune to continue the family legacy and pass the baton to the next generation.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 3/11/2018. Joseph “Joe” Kennedy’s political ambition passes first to his son Joe Jr. and then to reluctant second son, Jack.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 3/18/2018. John F. Kennedy launches a long-shot bid for power, but the seemingly perfect candidate must confront the issues of his health, faith and fidelity if he is to have any chance of reaching the White House.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 3/25/2018. A confident, popular John F. Kennedy is sworn in as the youngest ever elected American president, but he will have to rely on his brother, Attorney General Robert F. Kennedy, to help him navigate the disasters of 1961.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/08/2015. The world’s leading naturalists fight to keep this precious natural habitat in balance and save critically-endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/15/2015. The inhabitants of this remote Greek island live far longer than most Americans, but can they maintain their centuries-old way of life in the modern world?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/22/2015. Bill Weir travels to India to study conservation efforts to save the majestic Bengal tiger and visits an architectural marvel: the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 4/1/2018. As personal scandal threatens his marriage and looming nuclear war undermines his administration, President John F. Kennedy must fight to protect the presidency, the country and the world.

programme.title: American Dynasties: The Kennedys
programme.desc: Aired 4/8/2018. Numbed by grief after the assassination of her husband, Jackie crafts JFK’s legacy, while Bobby becomes a champion of the dispossessed and the family’s next great political hope.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2014. Anthony Bourdain soaks up all Amritsar has to offer. Go with him as he samples savory delicacies at roadside restaurants and experiences a Gurpurab festival.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2014. Anthony Bourdain soaks up all Amritsar has to offer. Go with him as he samples savory delicacies at roadside restaurants and experiences a Gurpurab festival.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2014. Anthony Bourdain travels to Las Vegas with food author Michael Ruhlman, where they explore sites including Huntridge Tavern.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/27/2014. Anthony Bourdain accompanies world-renowned chef Daniel Boulud as they travel back to his hometown of Lyon, France.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2014. Anthony Bourdain travels to Mexico City, Oaxaca and Cuernavaca, Mexico, where residents express their passion through food and art.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/04/2015. Bourdain and travel companion chef Eric Ripert visit France’s oldest city to experience its stew of cultures and cuisines.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El exalcalde de Las Vegas recibe un disparo en el Museo de la Mafia y el equipo de CSI se embarca en una lección de historia en busca de pistas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un helicóptero de evacuación médica secuestrado con el CSI Brody a bordo desaparece, todo el equipo está en la caza.

programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una desconocida cerca de las extrañas atracciones de un espectáculo itinerante inspirado en el siglo XIX, el equipo investiga un elenco de personajes inusuales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI llega a un accidente automovilístico, encuentran tres víctimas y un cerebro humano que no pertenece a ninguna de las víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga tres asesinatos aparentemente no relacionados, descubren que alguien se está vengando por asesinatos de casos sin resolver que nunca se resolvieron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que un traficante fallecido también era un experto en balística, tienen que trabajar con el FBI para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa del Dr. Robbins descubre el cuerpo de un hombre muerto desnudo en su dormitorio principal, el equipo de CSI se hace muchas preguntas.

programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luisa se contagió de Hepatitis C porque le echó leche materna de Diana a su café. Por otro lado, Rebeca tuvo un accidente porque se distrajo al ver una valla con su cuerpo desnudo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Wander desea adoptar a un niño, pero Tania, su mujer, no quiere porque se siente amenazada. Además, Valentina y Gabriela se sienten acosadas por un vecino que les dice piropos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ana se enganchó con la droga y perdió la custodia de su hija, que ahora está con su suegra. En otro caso, Santiago exige disolver su adopción para poder casarse con su madre adoptiva.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Mariana contrató una empresa de referidos para residencias de ancianos y ahora es un problema. Ketty dice que su hijo fue secuestrado por alienígenas que le dieron poder para salvar al mundo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luis tiene una carnicería en el 'mall' de Martina, pero ella es vegana y lo corrió. Además, Maya fue engañada por una agencia que la vendió a unos supuestos productores de cine.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Giovani es amanerado, todos piensan que es gay, incluso su propia familia, pero él lo niega. También, Juan es profesor de música y le regaló un iPhone a su alumna para espiarla.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Tras perder a su familia en un accidente, no le encuentra sentido a la vida, su socio no le quiere comprar su parte del negocio. Alejandra fue violada en su apartamento que tiene seguridad.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Isabel la atraparon en la frontera de Tijuana con 50 libras de marihuana, dice que eso no es suyo. También, Alejandro se entera que su esposa Tania está operada de un padecimiento congénito vaginal.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Una mujer demanda al marido de su difunta madre para abrir un centro contra la violencia doméstica. Además, la hija de Mayra le exige a su novio, un joven bonachón, que se pelee con su ex.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: José desaparece y Carolina tiene que vender un riñón por algo de dinero. Por otro lado, Teresa descubre que Israel le es infiel y por venganza hace público su engaño con un cartel.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Daniela se hizo varias fotos en los monumentos al Holocausto, pero alteraron sus imágenes. También, Anthony recibió fotografías de su hija muerta y, por los nervios, tuvo un accidente.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: De pequeña a Amanda la castigaban metiéndole la mano en el váter para que no se chupara el dedo. También, David siente una particular atracción por un árbol y se casó con él.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Cuando nacieron Nataly y Liliana las intercambiaron en el hospital, ahora se pelean la herencia. También, Carlos y Karen se disputan la tutela de su hermano discapacitado, pero lo hacen por dinero.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Heather uncovers her boyfriend taking his new lover to a hotel. Sandra learns her husband is unfaithful.

programme.desc: Alicia discovers what her man is up to at the club. Kamisha realizes her man will never change his spots.

programme.desc: Phillip learns his wife is carrying on with a co-worker. Caesar finds his woman on the prowl for a rich man.

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Sabrina uncovers her man has company during her night shifts. Jacqueline learns her husband has a double life.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Jodi finds out her girlfriend has a new lover. Denise busts her man and mistress watching a soccer game.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is stunned when he learns the true identity of the man who is the father of Roz's baby.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' envy and a series of mishaps may prevent Frasier from attending the festivities honoring him for his 1,000th radio show.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To take Niles' mind off his marital problems, Frasier invites him on an Alaskan cruise -- but neglects to tell Niles he's also invited Maris as a "surprise."

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier falls for a high-powered lawyer, whose successful career and take-charge attitude turns Frasier into a "wimp."

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When, Frasier gets "dumped" by his high-powered girlfriend Sam, he makes a fool of himself trying to win her back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: It's a Christmas to remember when Martin sings in a church pageant, Niles gets stuck in an elevator, and Frasier spills the beans about Roz's pregnancy to her unsuspecting mother.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at "her" hangout.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The discovery of an engagement ring hidden in their father's drawer leads Niles and Frasier to investigate Sherry's checkered past before Martin has a chance to "pop the question."

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Fed up with his cutthroat agent Bebe, Frasier soon learns the high price of hiring a "nice" agent to represent him in contract negotiations.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is shocked to discover that his trusted marriage counselor and Maris are having a torrid affair behind his back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A weekend ski trip snowballs into a hotbed of romantic antics for Frasier, Niles and their friends.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Lilith stirs old passions in Frasier and new ones in Niles.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane and Sam try to get Coach out of their hair by arranging a double date.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A man in the bar becomes sick of Cliff's obnoxious know-it-all behavior and challenges him to a fight. Will Cliff shut up, accept the challenge, or run away?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach brings fortunes to Cheers when he buys an antique scale.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane forbids Sam to go on an annual ski trip with his buddies.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach is hurt when he learns that his deceased friend once propositioned his wife.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tries to prove his manliness when his new client makes advances.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam hires a brilliant artist to paint Diane as a peace offering.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane defends her relationship with Sam to a slandering artist.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin unexpectedly returns after running out on Rebecca and the law.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Kevin McHale joins the Cheers gang in a basketball game against their rival bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam tries to get Rebecca back at Cheers after she takes another job.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca's miffed when Robin's ex tells the press that she's his true love.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Roz takes a vacation, Frasier's new call screener takes over Roz's job — and his show.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles uncork a bad case of sibling rivalry when they compete for a prestigious position in their wine club.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While Niles joins Martin on a stakeout, Roz and Frasier flirt with the idea of becoming more than just friends.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: Ella y yo
programme.desc: Una joven rica escapa a la ciudad pero se enfrenta a algunos problemas durante su viaje. Ella termina tomando un autobús y conoce a un mujeriego que intenta seducirla.

programme.title: Rosauro Castro
programme.desc: García Mata, funcionario del gobierno, viaja a un pequeño pueblo mexicano para investigar el asesinato de Cardozo, candidato a la alcaldía y enemigo del "Cacique" Rosauro Castro, quien gobierna con mano de hierro.

programme.title: La escondida
programme.desc: A comienzos del siglo XX, surge una dramática historia que cuenta el amor entre una bella mujer llamada Gabriela y un hombre revolucionario. Lucharán por su amor en un escenario de violentas y apasionantes batallas.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: Ella y yo
programme.desc: Una joven rica escapa a la ciudad pero se enfrenta a algunos problemas durante su viaje. Ella termina tomando un autobús y conoce a un mujeriego que intenta seducirla.

programme.title: Rosauro Castro
programme.desc: García Mata, funcionario del gobierno, viaja a un pequeño pueblo mexicano para investigar el asesinato de Cardozo, candidato a la alcaldía y enemigo del "Cacique" Rosauro Castro, quien gobierna con mano de hierro.

programme.title: Telaraña
programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: La raíz del miedo
programme.desc: Una película de suspenso judicial, acerca de un abogado astuto (Richard Gere) que lleva el caso aparentemente perdido de un monaguillo (Edward Norton), acusado de asesinar a un ilustre sacerdote católico.

programme.title: Belleza americana
programme.desc: La vida de Lester dista mucho de ser perfecta. Al hacer algunos cambios en su vida, encuentra más libertad y felicidad. Pero está a punto de descubrir que la verdadera libertad tiene un precio.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Ganadora del Oscar, Susan Sarandon interpreta a la hermana Helen Prejean. Una mujer espiritual quien se embarca en la peligrosa misión de salvar a un joven condenado a la pena de muerte.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Aires de esperanza
programme.desc: Del director Jason Reitman, Aires de Esperanza presenta a Kate Winslet y Josh Brolin como dos extraños que se conocen inesperadamente. Lo que comienza como un encuentro durante un fin de semana, se transforma en una segunda oportunidad para el amor.

programme.title: Atlas de geografia humana
programme.desc: Fran, Rosa, Ana and Marisa have jobs putting together an Atlas of Geography. Their fairly predictable lives are about to change, starting now. While working on the Atlas, they experience romance, heartbreak, infidelity, and reconciliation.

programme.title: Entre el amor y el engaño
programme.desc: Sydney Carpenter no puede evitar sentir que tiene la vida perfecta hasta que su esposo y su hijo desaparecen. Mientras busca a su familia, se da cuenta de que su marido no era quien ella pensaba.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: Robocop 2
programme.desc: En Detroit reina el caos debido a una huelga policial y a una nueva droga, y solo Robocop (Peter Weller) puede parar este alboroto. Sin embargo, se topará con un duro cíborg, por lo que Robocop necesitará emplearse a fondo para salvar la ciudad.

programme.title: Robocop 3
programme.desc: Los directivos de la OCP imponen una ley de desahucio para los habitantes de la ciudad. Robocop se unirá a los amenazados habitantes de Detroit para impedir que se cumplan los planes de la OCP.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir 18 años por matar a un hombre en un duelo, un hombre regresa a su ciudad natal decidido a llevar una vida normal, pero los hijos del hombre al que mató están empeñados en vengarse.

programme.title: La hija del lobo
programme.desc: Una veterana militar debe rastrear a la banda que secuestró a su hijo en el desierto helado, solo para descubrir un secreto mortal y enfrentarse a un líder despiadado que pondrá a prueba hasta dónde llegará una madre para proteger a su hijo.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Tormentero
programme.desc: El cuento mágico de Romero, ahora un pescador jubilado, que hace años descubrió un campo petrolero en su pueblo que causó que sus amigos y vecinos perdieran su forma de vida y lo rechazaran.

programme.title: Day of the Dead: Celebration of Life
programme.desc: Each year, the spirits of the dead visit the living in this fascinating look into this famous Mexican tradition.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Pueblo Navideño
programme.desc: Una adicta al trabajo sospecha de la partida repentina de su padre para mudarse a un pequeño pueblo en Navidad.

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Novios por navidad
programme.desc: La organizadora de eventos Valeria, traicionada por su amiga Tere que le robó a su prometido, finge un romance con Camilo para vengarse, lo que desemboca en una inesperada historia de amor navideña.

programme.title: Cupido navideño
programme.desc: Dos asistentes ejecutivos que trabajan duro hacen arreglos para que sus jefes se enamoren durante las vacaciones.

programme.title: Navidad en cuatro patas
programme.desc: Maggie y Jack, dos personas solteras, tratan de regalar un perro a sus hijos de Navidad. Su lucha por la custodia de un mismo animal, les lleva a hacer algo que nunca hubieran esperado: enamorarse.

programme.title: Navidad Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Con solo dos días antes de Navidad, Angelina se embarca en una misión casi imposible para tratar de salvar a su malcriada hija de 14 años, de ir por el camino equivocado. ¿Podrá Angelina sacar a su hija de la lista de los traviesos?

programme.title: Préstame tu corazón
programme.desc: Una madre soltera acepta hacerse pasar temporalmente como la esposa de su jefe, el cual necesita una esposa para impresionar a un industrialista amante de las tradiciones.

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño
programme.desc: Para salvar su reputación, Piper Jensen, un genio en relaciones públicas y dueña de su propia agencia de relaciones públicas, acepta trabajar para el dueño de un Pueblo de Santa en dificultades, ahí descubrirá el amor y cuán mágica es la Navidad.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Summer Camp (LAS)
programme.desc: En la búsqueda de diversión y nuevas experiencias, cuatro jóvenes se ofrecen como líderes de un campamento. La noche anterior a la llegada de los niños y sin motivo aparente, comienzan a atacarse furiosamente entre ellos.

programme.title: Terrifier (LAS)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Resucitados
programme.desc: Un grupo de investigadores médicos descubren una manera de revivir a los pacientes muertos.

programme.title: Km 31-2
programme.desc: Siete años después de trabajar en los aterradores casos del km 31, el oficial Martín Ugalde es llamado para investigar una serie de casos sobre niños desaparecidos similares a los del kilómetro 31.

programme.title: Mil palabras
programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: Swingers
programme.desc: Dos amigos dispuestos a reescribir de manera moderna las citas románticas entre Los Ángeles y Las Vegas. En este clásico de la comedia independiente para reír a carcajadas, que lanzó las carreras de su excelente elenco.

programme.title: El principe de las mujeres
programme.desc: Marcus Graham, un ejecutivo publicitario, es el soltero por antonomasia y siempre lleva a una mujer nueva del brazo. Cuando aparece en escena Jacqueline, su nueva jefa, Marcus recibe por primera vez su propia medicina.

programme.title: Jacuzzi al pasado
programme.desc: ¡Prepárese a olvidar el pasado con la versión inapropiada más salvaje del jacuzzi al pasado! Las risas comienzan cuando cuatro amigos comparten una noche en un jacuzzi en un resort de esquí, y se despiertan con una fuerte resaca en 1986.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: Basada en la increíble historia real, Meryl Streep nos entrega una actuación cómica y conmovedora, como una mujer de sociedad de Nueva York que sueña con convertirse en una gran cantante de ópera, a pesar de tener una voz cómicamente espantosa.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Verano de locura
programme.desc: Carl Reiner (The Jerk) dirige esta historia sobre un padre de familia que toma unas vacaciones normales y alquila una finca de verano en Florida.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Five Guns To Tombstone
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw is living a clean life until his no-good brother who just escaped from prison ropes him into pulling a robbery. Now Billy has his own plan...to prevent it. And all he needs is his six shooters and a little luck.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Return Of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Those Daring Young Men In Their Jaunty Jalopies (Monte Carlo or Bust!)
programme.desc: Rival 1920s business partners (Tony Curtis, Terry-Thomas) join wacky international drivers in the 1,500-mile Monte Carlo Rally.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: Charlie is out of jail and on the make with a plan for the heist of the century. Aided by top criminal mastermind Mr Bridger, Charlie sets off with a team of villains and to lift $4,000,000 from under the noses of the Turin Polizei.

programme.title: The Night They Raided Minsky's
programme.desc: Britt Ekland, Elliott Gould and Jason Robards lead a stellar cast -- including Bert Lahr in his final performance -- in this utterly charming comedy about a young Amish girl who accidentally creates the striptease during the golden age of burlesque!

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of a new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new Human Humane committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word…even the Air Force…and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait…did he even want to?

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un choque mortal en 1983 causado por el equipo de seguridad de la reina de Inglaterra durante una visita a California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him from exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is a suspect in Elsworth Chisolm's apparent murder; Zorelli is put back on the Grimes case; Charles Matthews warns Blake that Zorelli has been asking him questions about Blake's father.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Charles Matthews tells Blake a grim secret; Zorelli finds a bug hidden in his apartment; Alexis tells Monica that Jason Colby isn't her father; Alexis learns she has a Fredrick Stahl original and realizes Blake's deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis threatens to sue Blake for half of the plundered Nazzi treasure unless Sable withdraws her lawsuits against Colbyco. Sable agrees; Krystina leads Fallon to the treasure. They are followed by Dennis Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle Grant Jennings prepares to marry wealthy oil tycoon Blake Carrington, Matthew Blaisdel, a former lover, returns to town and causes her second thoughts.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's estranged son Steven returns home for the ceremony, as does rebellious daughter Fallon, who objects to the union. Blake and Krystle reconcile; Matthew is reunited with his wife and daughter; Walter's rig is sabotaged.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Krystle are married; Jeff Colby pursues a disinterested Fallon; Walter and Matthew form a business partnership; Claudia and Lindsay try without success to resolve their differences.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Urgent business cuts short Blake and Krystle's honeymoon; Steven takes a job working for Matthew Blaisdel; Cecil proposes that Fallon marry his nephew.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake invites Matthew to dinner at the mansion to entice him to return to Denver-Carrington; Krystle clashes with head butler, Joseph; Matthew tells Krystle he's still in love with her; Jeff attempts to win Fallon.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven's ex-lover, Ted, arrives from New York; Fallon reluctantly marries Jeff Colby; Blake hires Michael, the chauffeur, to do undercover work for Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Search for the Great Sharks
programme.desc: From the coast of California to the remote reaches of South and Western Australia, this film pursues blue sharks, whale sharks, and the notorious great white to allow viewers an up-close experience.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show.

programme.title: When Sharks Meets Croc
programme.desc: The most aggressive of ocean predators, the bull shark, is notorious for leaving the safety of the deep blue ocean, venturing far up the murky rivers of Africa's coast in search of prey.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Caribbean - The Wild Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Between the continents of North and South America is a tropical paradise: the Caribbean. This archipelago of over 7,000 islands and reefs lies within the crystal clear waters of the Caribbean Sea.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Galapagos - Darwin's Eden
programme.desc: Situated 1,000km west of Ecuador in South America, the Galapagos archipelago contains 13 main islands and a hundred or so smaller rocks and reefs. The region's wilderness is so pristine and rich in life it altered our entire view of the natural world.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka - Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides - Land of Legends
programme.desc: Lying just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. Isolation from the mainland has made it the perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400km, and cover an incredible range of climates. Winter in the central and northern islands can be savage, but summer in the sweltering southern islands couldn't be more different.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: The Anavilhanas and Mariua archipelagos consist of more than 1,000 river islands and stretch along a 1,000km stretch of the Rio Negro, deep in the heart of the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Vancouver Island's glaciers fuel the flow of some of Canada's tallest waterfalls, and an endless network of rivers and creeks provides the ideal habitat for one of the world's most important fish – the pacific salmon.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: The Philippines are a chain of around 7,000 tropical islands in the western Pacific. Plants-turned- predators line the edge of the forests, while rivers help carve one of the world's most spectacular cave systems.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: The Falkland's bleak, battered and windswept archipelago lies 460 km from the South American mainland. Rugged mountains and expansive pristine coastline remain unspoilt by human development.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost is on top of the world; federal agents work to prove St. Patrick is guilty for the murder of Terry Silver.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After being framed by Ghost for the murder of Jason Micic, Dre plans on leaving New York, but first he needs to take care of unfinished business.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Paz, still grieving Angela's death, seeks allies in the pursuit of justice or vengeance so she forms an alliance with Warner; they hatch a plan to arrest Ghost for the murder of Angela but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy is on a path to avenge LaKeisha's murder; Elisa Marie investigates what's on the USB stick given to her by her father; Tommy must destroy the evidence, and he may need Ghost's help to retrieve it.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Tate tasks Dre to kill Ghost; Tate's hatred toward St. Patrick motivates him to lie during a Federal questioning; the Feds are in striking distance of convicting St. Patrick for Silver's murder.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Brooke and Jess search for a woman whose husband was blown up in his car.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: At the wedding of Eric's best friend, the groom is attack and the bride goes missing, pushing Brooke into the work mode.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the rest of the Keaton family away for the weekend, Mallory is excited about having the house to herself until she is accidentally locked in the basement with the person she'd least like to be with--her adoring neighbor, Skippy.

programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life (Part 1 of 2)
